title: pelargonium cavanillesii
intro: Pelargonium cavanillesii, also known as the Cavanilles' Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Pelargonium cavanillesii include relief from digestive issues, sore throats, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory health. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
